findings.location: s2 — [復路処理] step 5 and [例外処理] step 3a/4a
findings.description: The full method signatures for the TransactionEventCallback callback methods are present in the source but not captured in the knowledge file. The source specifies `TransactionEventCallback#transactionNormalEnd(Object data, ExecutionContext context): void` and `TransactionEventCallback#transactionAbnormalEnd(Object data, ExecutionContext context): void`. The knowledge file only mentions the method names without parameter types, which are needed when implementing the interface.
findings.source_evidence:
TransactionEventCallback#transactionNormalEnd(Object data, ExecutionContext context): void
TransactionEventCallback#transactionAbnormalEnd(Object data, ExecutionContext context): void

findings.location: s3 — 設定項目・拡張ポイント, 基本設定の説明文
findings.description: The source text after the basic configuration XML example states "接続名を明示的に指定する場合は、属性dbConnectionNameにその値を設定する" — mentioning a `dbConnectionName` attribute for explicit connection name specification. This attribute name is not captured in the knowledge file at all. Note: the source is internally inconsistent (the actual XML examples use `transactionName` / `connectionName`, not `dbConnectionName`, and the properties table omits it), but the attribute name mentioned in the prose is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: デフォルトの設定では、トランザクションが暗黙的に使用する接続名に対して接続オブジェクトを登録する。接続名を明示的に指定する場合は、属性dbConnectionNameにその値を設定する。
